events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario is about digging without an 811 locate on a heavy-industrial site. This is a serious safety and compliance violation.

  "findings": [
    "Excavation performed without 811 locate/ticket — no utility clearance verified before digging",
    "Underground utilities may have been struck or damaged during unlocated excavation",
    "Violation of CGA/811 one-call best practices and site permit requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all excavation work immediately and secure the area",
    "Request 811 locate ticket and wait for utility marking/verification",
    "Inspect exposed excavation for utility damage; pothole/hand-expose suspected utilities",
    "Notify site safety and utility owners; document and rework as needed"
  ],
  "rationale": "Digging without an 811 locate is a critical non-compliance that risks striking buried utilities. At rough-complete stage, any installed work is suspect until utilities are verified and inspected for damage.",

    "OSHA 29 CFR 1926.651(b) - Underground Installations"
  ]
